query: Use /autoconsultant to turn this rough queue-aging idea into an approved plan, prepare both Automake roles, and stop at a copy-paste run-now handoff.
Invoke the Autoconsultant skill for this repository. Carry one question sequence through Consultant and Automake setup without executing the ratchet here.
/autoconsultant resume ~/.consultant/parcel-latency, finish the review, use maximum two iterations and one consecutive failure, then hand the approved setup to a fresh agent.
Please use Autoconsultant as the named workflow: consult on this notification change, separately approve the Optimizer and Evaluator, and produce the safe handoff.
Activate /autoconsultant for the current repo and preserve every reference named by the reviewed plan when you transfer control to Automake run-now.
I explicitly want the Autoconsultant skill for a fresh consultation about this import repair. Use Automake defaults and stop before Git preflight or implementation.
/autoconsultant continue the beacon-reminder plan, let me revise the proposed Optimizer before approval, approve the Evaluator separately, and emit only the final handoff.
Call autoconsultant for this ambiguous cache-cleanup request so the idea becomes a reviewed plan and an already-approved evaluator-optimizer setup for another agent.
Run the Autoconsultant skill, keep all Consultant questions continuously numbered across both phases, and make the final payload safe around nested Markdown fences.
Use /autoconsultant here. Resolve a test-pass success condition with me, embed the complete approved roles and absolute paths, then do not run Automake in this conversation.
Use /consultant to turn this rough permissions idea into an adversarially reviewed implementation plan and builder handoff.
Use /automake to run an approved evaluator-optimizer ratchet on the current repository for up to three iterations.
First help me plan this export feature, then implement it with a test-driven loop once I approve the plan.
Draft separate Optimizer and Evaluator prompts from this existing plan, but do not invoke a skill or launch an agent.
Review ~/.consultant/parcel-latency/plan.md for blockers and suggest revisions without starting Automake setup.
Implement the approved plan with the existing optimizer.md and evaluator.md, run the tests, and keep the change if it passes.
Explain how Consultant and Automake could be composed into one workflow, including where their approval boundary should sit.
Do not invoke Autoconsultant. Just tell me whether the final handoff should embed role prompts or link to them.
Our consulting firm wants an automated consultant intake form that assigns new clients to an advisor.
Use autoconsultation to generate a medical follow-up summary from these appointment notes.
